summary: Tested User Dashboard (/user), Private Messaging APIs, and Admin Chat Moderation. All features working correctly. 23/24 backend tests passed (1 minor issue: /api/admin/merchants endpoint doesn't exist - frontend uses wrong URL).

minor.issue: Endpoint doesn't exist. Frontend AdminPanel.js calls /api/admin/merchants but backend only has /api/merchants/all

integration_issues.issue: AdminPanel.js line 262 and 780 call ${API}/admin/merchants which returns 404. Should use ${API}/merchants/all

passed_tests: Auth: Admin login (admin/000000)
Auth: Trader login (trader/000000)
Auth: Trader2 login (trader2/000000)
GET /api/traders/me - Trader profile with balance and has_shop
GET /api/traders/stats - P2P stats (salesCount, purchasesCount, volumes)
GET /api/trades/sales/active - Active sales for P2P section
GET /api/trades/purchases/active - Active purchases for P2P section
GET /api/marketplace/my-purchases - Marketplace purchases for Market section
GET /api/users/search - Search users by nickname
GET /api/users/online - Get all users for messaging
GET /api/conversations - Get user's conversations
POST /api/conversations/{user_id} - Create or get conversation
POST /api/conversations/{conv_id}/messages - Send private message
GET /api/conversations/{conv_id}/messages - Get messages in conversation
POST /api/conversations/{user_id} - Cannot message self (400)
POST /api/conversations/{conv_id}/messages - Empty message rejected (400)
GET /api/admin/conversations - Admin view all conversations with participant_names and message_count
GET /api/admin/private-messages - Admin view all private messages
Admin endpoints protected (401 without auth)
Traders blocked from admin endpoints (403)
GET /api/admin/traders - Admin view all users (renamed from Traders to Пользователи)
GET /api/admin/trades - Admin view all trades
GET /api/admin/shops - Admin view marketplace shops
Frontend: User Dashboard /user - P2P section with stats and active trades
Frontend: User Dashboard /user/market - Market section with catalog, purchases, shop management
Frontend: User Dashboard /user/chat - Chat section with conversations list and new chat button
Frontend: Private messaging - View conversation, send messages, timestamps, read status
Frontend: Admin Panel /admin - Overview with stats
Frontend: Admin Panel /admin/p2p/traders - User management (renamed to Пользователи P2P)
Frontend: Admin Panel /admin/chat/moderation - Private messages moderation with conversation list and message deletion
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend AdminPanel.js uses incorrect API endpoint /api/admin/merchants instead of /api/merchants/all
updated_files: /app/tests/test_user_dashboard_chat.py - Created comprehensive test suite for User Dashboard and Private Messaging

test_credentials.trader: login='trader', password='000000' - has shop, balance ~5952 USDT

seed_data_creation: Sent test messages via pytest and UI testing between trader and trader2. Existing conversation conv_36fa0ca8b025 now has 5+ messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified: (1) User Dashboard at /user with nested routes: /user (P2P stats, active trades), /user/market (catalog, purchases, shop management), /user/chat (conversations, private messaging). (2) Private Messaging APIs: GET /api/conversations, POST /api/conversations/{user_id}, GET/POST /api/conversations/{conv_id}/messages, GET /api/users/search, GET /api/users/online. (3) Admin Chat Moderation at /admin/chat/moderation: GET /api/admin/conversations (with participant_names, message_count), GET /api/admin/private-messages, DELETE /api/admin/private-messages/{id}, DELETE /api/admin/conversations/{id}. (4) Terminology updated: Traders -> Пользователи in admin panel sidebar. Minor issue: AdminPanel.js calls /api/admin/merchants which doesn't exist (should be /api/merchants/all).
